svg.title: The next hires: design-tool-equipped thinkers and a security reviewer — with QA and automated checks already on staff
svg.desc: Two future roles for the AI team. First, the Discovery and UX roles gain design tools: Discovery maps journeys in Miro, UX draws flow and state diagrams in Miro and high-fidelity screens in Figma, and builders read those screens read-only in Dev Mode; anything read back off a board is treated as data, not instructions. Second, a security reviewer that red-teams each feature before ship, enforces least access, and stops outside content from hijacking a session — held until the product goes live. A footer strip shows what has already shipped since the post: the QA inspector, automated gate-checks, and sandboxed lanes.
svg.text: Two specialists still ahead of us — each a fresh expert, each in a lane of its own.
Discovery & UX, live in Miro + Figma
• Discovery maps the user journey in Miro
• UX draws flow & state diagrams in Miro
• UX designs high-fidelity screens in Figma
• Builders read them in Dev Mode — read-only
Anything fetched back = data, never commands
red-teams each feature before it ships
• "What could be made to go wrong?"
• Outside text can't hijack a session
• Ideally a different AI model — uncorrelated
Held until we go live — real money / data / web
Already joined — shipped since this post
